case_title: STATE OF OREGON ACTING BY AND THROUGH THE VS. DOUGLAS T WATSON

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF OREGON ACTING BY AND THROUGH THE DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, DOUGLAS T JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
